text:
Rep: Thanks for taking the time. Walk me through how reconciliation works today at NovaPay.
Prospect: Mostly spreadsheets plus a nightly batch job. It breaks monthly.
Rep: That matches what we hear. Atlas Core automates the matching layer.
Prospect: Honestly, the price point worries me. We are a 35 person company.
Rep: Fair. Pricing scales with volume, not seats.
Prospect: Second concern, we already committed to an internal build this year, so timing is difficult.
Rep: Understood. Many customers ran us alongside the internal tool first.
Prospect: And third, our CTO is skeptical about adding another vendor with access to payment data. Security review would be heavy.
Rep: We are SOC 2 Type II and can start with read-only sandbox data.
Prospect: Okay. Send the security pack and a pilot proposal.

Rep: Renewal time. How has the year been with Atlas Insights?
Customer: Genuinely great. The finance team lives in the dashboards now.
Rep: Love to hear it. Any gaps?
Customer: Minor export quirks, nothing blocking. We want to add two more teams.
Rep: We can bundle that into the renewal with a multi-year discount.
Customer: Send the paperwork. Happy to be a reference too.
